/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gmttools.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gmttools.dir/gmttools_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmttools.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmttools.dir/std_colour_scale.cpp.o -o gmttools  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/base/prc_com:" ../../base/prc_com/libprc_com.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
